steps.title: Create two points from the slope
steps.content: The graph has slope $2$ and passes through $(1,14)$. A slope of $2$ means that when $x$ increases by $1$, $y$ increases by $2$, so a second point is $(2,16)$.

steps.title: Use linear regression
steps.content: Type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=2$ and $b=12$, so $g(x)=2x+12$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice C matches $g(x)=2x+12$. It also checks with the given point: $g(1)=2(1)+12=14$, so choice C is correct.
